title: rosa omissa f. gillotii
intro: Rosa omissa f. gillotii, also known as the forgotten rose, is a plant species in the genus Rosa that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. Rosa omissa f. gillotii is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
